div.p: Este case-sensitive sistema de código https://fhir.heartlandprotocol.org/CodeSystem/heartland-evidence-level define o seguinte códigos:

tr.td: Interventions with strong guideline support, such as SGLT2i for all HF phenotypes endorsed by the 2022 AHA/ACC/HFSA guideline.
Recent trial findings not yet fully incorporated into guidelines, such as finerenone for HFpEF based on the FINEARTS-HF trial.
Tools developed for clinical utility without formal statistical validation, such as the HEARTLAND Risk Score itself.

description.value: Three-tiered transparency labels distinguishing evidence strength behind HEARTLAND Protocol v3.2 recommendations, helping clinicians calibrate clinical decisions.

definition.value: Interventions with strong guideline support, such as SGLT2i for all HF phenotypes endorsed by the 2022 AHA/ACC/HFSA guideline.
Recent trial findings not yet fully incorporated into guidelines, such as finerenone for HFpEF based on the FINEARTS-HF trial.
Tools developed for clinical utility without formal statistical validation, such as the HEARTLAND Risk Score itself.
